hero.main_title: MH Tech Consulting – Your partner in IT consulting and technology staffing
hero.description: MH Tech Consulting supports businesses in their technology projects by offering IT consulting, cybersecurity, DevOps, digital design and IT operations services. We also provide qualified IT talent to meet organizations' recruitment needs.

about.title: Modern technology solutions to support your growth
about.description: MH Tech Consulting supports businesses in their technology projects by offering IT consulting, cybersecurity, DevOps, digital design and IT operations services. We also provide qualified IT talent to meet organizations' recruitment needs.
about.expertise_text: IT and IT solutions, web and application development, cybersecurity, digital design and digital transformation.
about.why_choose_text: Modern technological expertise, tailored solutions, security, reliability and results-oriented strategic support.

faq.title: Do you have questions in mind? Get the answers now
faq.answer1: From initial analysis to implementation, we prioritize quality, reliability and customer satisfaction in every intervention. Make us your trusted partner to achieve your goals.
faq.question2: Will the solution be tailored to my business?
faq.answer2: Absolutely. We design each custom solution based on your company's specific needs, industry sector and strategic objectives.
faq.answer3: We support you through all preparation stages: initial audit, detailed planning, team training and progressive implementation to ensure a smooth transition.
faq.question4: How to choose the right solution?
faq.answer4: Our team of experts analyzes your needs, existing infrastructure and future goals to recommend the most suitable and efficient solution.

about_page.main_title: Your partner to design, develop and secure your digital solutions
about_page.description: MHTECH Consulting is a company specializing in technology services and IT consulting. We combine technical expertise, innovation and creativity to provide effective solutions for modern businesses.
about_page.mission_desc: Help organizations integrate modern technology solutions that improve their productivity, secure their infrastructure and strengthen their competitiveness.
about_page.vision_desc: Become a leading technology partner for businesses looking to modernize their systems, develop their digital solutions and strengthen their digital security.
about_page.services_title: Our areas of intervention for digital transformation
about_page.service1_desc: Implementation, maintenance and optimization of IT infrastructure.
about_page.service2_desc: Creation of web platforms, applications and tailor-made digital solutions.
about_page.service3_desc: System protection, vulnerability analysis and digital defense strategy.
about_page.service4_desc: Design of visuals, interfaces and high-value communication media.
about_page.service5_desc: Cloud solutions, automation and modern technology platforms for business.
about_page.service6_desc: Support and advice to align technology with your business objectives.
about_page.value3_desc: System and data protection at the heart of our solutions
about_page.value4_desc: A close working relationship to understand your needs
about_page.value6_desc: Technical expertise at the service of your growth
about_page.testimonial1_text: MHTECH Consulting offers reliable, modern support tailored to the real needs of businesses.

services_page.intro_title: Tailor-made IT solutions for your business
services_page.intro_description: MH Tech Consulting supports you in all your technology projects with expertise and innovation
services_page.service1_desc:
Complete protection for your systems:
• Security audit and vulnerability analysis
• Implementation of protection solutions
• Team training and awareness
• Intrusion testing and pentesting
• GDPR compliance and security standards
services_page.service2_desc:
Optimize your infrastructure:
• Cloud migration and management (AWS, Azure, GCP)
• CI/CD automation
• Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible)
• Containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
• Performance monitoring and optimization
services_page.service3_desc:
Modern and efficient interfaces:
• UI/UX design and interface design
• Web and mobile application development
• Graphic design and visual identity
• Prototyping and user testing
• User experience optimization
services_page.service4_desc:
Support and maintenance for your systems:
• Technical support level 1, 2 and 3
• System and network administration
• Incident and problem management
• Preventive and corrective maintenance
• Technical documentation and procedures
services_page.cta_text: Need a personalized IT solution for your business?
services_page.contact_title: Let's Build Your Next Technology Solution
services_page.contact_description: Do you have a technology project or want to modernize your IT infrastructure? The MHTECH Consulting team is ready to support you with solutions tailored to your needs.
services_page.form_message_placeholder: Describe your project or your need
services_page.process_step1_text: We analyze your challenges to target the most suitable solution.
services_page.process_step2_text: We discuss with you to understand your business and technical objectives.
services_page.process_step3_text: You get a clear, consistent and personalized roadmap.
services_page.process_step4_text: We deploy, secure and evolve your solution over time.

testimonials_page.testimonial1_text: MHTECH Consulting has transformed our IT infrastructure. Their technical expertise and responsiveness exceeded our expectations. A team of highly qualified professionals who truly understand business challenges.
testimonials_page.testimonial2_text: Thanks to MHTECH's IT staffing service, we quickly found expert profiles for our digital transformation project. Personalized support and very high level consultants.

staffing_page.intro_title: Find the IT Talent You Need
staffing_page.intro_description: MH Tech Consulting connects top IT skills with innovative companies
staffing_page.for_companies_description: Looking to strengthen your team with qualified IT experts? MH Tech Consulting helps you quickly recruit the best talent for your technology projects.
staffing_page.talent1_desc: Full Stack, Front-end, Back-end, Mobile, DevOps - Qualified developers for all your technical needs.
staffing_page.talent2_desc: UI/UX Designers, graphic designers, user experience experts to create high-performing interfaces.
staffing_page.talent3_desc: IT security specialists, pentesters, SOC analysts to protect your systems.
staffing_page.talent4_desc: Project Managers, Scrum Masters, Product Owners to lead your technology initiatives.
staffing_page.talent5_desc: Experts in architecture, cloud, data science and artificial intelligence for your strategic projects.
staffing_page.talent6_desc: System administrators, support technicians, IT operators to maintain your infrastructures.
staffing_page.for_candidates_description: Are you an IT professional seeking new opportunities? MH Tech Consulting supports your career development with exciting missions and innovative projects.
staffing_page.candidate_benefit1_desc: Access to diversified projects in different sectors: finance, healthcare, e-commerce, industry and more.
staffing_page.candidate_benefit2_desc: Support throughout your journey, from mission search to integration into your new team.
staffing_page.cv_section_description: Join our IT talent pool and access opportunities at our clients.
staffing_page.cv_message_placeholder: Tell us about your experience and skills...
staffing_page.recruit_section_description: Entrust us with your IT talent needs. We provide qualified profiles suited to your projects.
staffing_page.recruit_description_placeholder: Describe the desired profile, required skills, project context...

ui_ux.hero_description: We design intuitive and engaging interfaces that transform your ideas into memorable digital experiences.
ui_ux.what_text: UI/UX design combines visual aesthetics (UI) and user experience (UX) to create high-performing digital products. Our user-centered approach ensures intuitive, accessible interfaces aligned with your business objectives.
ui_ux.service1_desc: Needs analysis, personas, user journeys and usability testing to understand your audience.
ui_ux.service2_desc: Interactive mockups and clickable prototypes to validate your concepts before development.
ui_ux.service3_desc: Creation of coherent design systems, reusable components and strong visual identity.
ui_ux.service4_desc: Continuous evaluation, A/B testing and optimization based on real user feedback.
ui_ux.why_text: Good UI/UX design increases customer satisfaction, reduces development costs, improves conversions and strengthens your brand image.
ui_ux.description1: We design intuitive and engaging interfaces that transform your ideas into memorable digital experiences.
ui_ux.description2: UI/UX design combines visual aesthetics (UI) and user experience (UX) to create high-performing digital products. Our user-centered approach ensures intuitive, accessible interfaces aligned with your business objectives.
ui_ux.point1: Needs analysis, personas, user journeys and usability testing to understand your audience.
ui_ux.point2: Interactive mockups and clickable prototypes to validate your concepts before development.
ui_ux.point3: Creation of coherent design systems, reusable components and strong visual identity.
ui_ux.point4: Continuous evaluation, A/B testing and optimization based on real user feedback.

web_dev.hero_description: We develop robust, scalable and secure web applications tailored to your specific needs.
web_dev.what_text: Web development consists of creating websites and applications accessible via browser. Our expertise covers front-end, back-end and cloud architectures to deliver complete and high-performing solutions.
web_dev.service1_desc: Elegant institutional websites, responsive and optimized for SEO and performance.
web_dev.service2_desc: Business platforms, SaaS, CRM and tailor-made solutions with scalable architectures.
web_dev.service3_desc: Secure online stores, integrated payment systems and product catalog management.
web_dev.service4_desc: Continuous technical support, security updates and functional evolution of your applications.
web_dev.why_text: A professional web presence is essential to reach your customers, automate your processes and develop your business in today's digital environment.
web_dev.description1: We develop robust, scalable and secure web applications tailored to your specific needs.
web_dev.description2: Web development consists of creating websites and applications accessible via browser. Our expertise covers front-end, back-end and cloud architectures to deliver complete and high-performing solutions.
web_dev.point1: Elegant institutional websites, responsive and optimized for SEO and performance.
web_dev.point2: Business platforms, SaaS, CRM and tailor-made solutions with scalable architectures.
web_dev.point3: Secure online stores, integrated payment systems and product catalog management.
web_dev.point4: Continuous technical support, security updates and functional evolution of your applications.

digital_marketing.hero_description: We develop tailor-made digital strategies to increase your visibility, generate qualified leads and maximize your ROI.
digital_marketing.what_text: Digital marketing encompasses all marketing techniques deployed on digital channels: SEO, SEA, social media, content marketing and email marketing. Our data-driven approach guarantees measurable results.
digital_marketing.service1_desc: On-page and off-page optimization, keyword research and content strategies to improve your Google ranking.
digital_marketing.service2_desc: Google Ads, Facebook Ads and LinkedIn Ads campaigns optimized to maximize your return on investment.
digital_marketing.service3_desc: Community management, engaging content creation and advertising campaigns on social networks.
digital_marketing.service4_desc: Editorial strategy, quality content creation and multi-channel distribution to attract and convert.
digital_marketing.why_text: Digital marketing allows you to precisely target your audience, measure your performance in real time and continuously optimize your campaigns for better ROI.
digital_marketing.description1: We develop tailor-made digital strategies to increase your visibility, generate qualified leads and maximize your ROI.
digital_marketing.description2: Digital marketing encompasses all marketing techniques deployed on digital channels: SEO, SEA, social media, content marketing and email marketing. Our data-driven approach guarantees measurable results.
digital_marketing.point1: On-page and off-page optimization, keyword research and content strategies to improve your Google ranking.
digital_marketing.point2: Google Ads, Facebook Ads and LinkedIn Ads campaigns optimized to maximize your return on investment.
digital_marketing.point3: Community management, engaging content creation and advertising campaigns on social networks.
digital_marketing.point4: Editorial strategy, quality content creation and multi-channel distribution to attract and convert.

business_analysis.hero_subtitle: Align your IT with your business objectives
business_analysis.hero_description: We analyze your processes, identify improvement opportunities and design IT solutions perfectly aligned with your strategy.
business_analysis.what_text: Business analysis bridges the gap between business needs and technological solutions. Our analysts translate your requirements into clear functional specifications to ensure the success of your IT projects.
business_analysis.service1_desc: Mapping of existing processes, identification of inefficiencies and optimization recommendations.
business_analysis.service2_desc: Writing detailed specifications, user stories and precise acceptance criteria.
business_analysis.service3_desc: Design of robust data models, entity-relationship schemas and information architecture.
business_analysis.service4_desc: Team support, training and change management to ensure solution adoption.
business_analysis.why_text: Rigorous business analysis reduces project risks, optimizes IT investments and ensures that delivered solutions truly meet business needs.
business_analysis.description1: We analyze your processes, identify improvement opportunities and design IT solutions perfectly aligned with your strategy.
business_analysis.description2: Business analysis bridges the gap between business needs and technological solutions. Our analysts translate your requirements into clear functional specifications to ensure the success of your IT projects.
business_analysis.point1: Mapping of existing processes, identification of inefficiencies and optimization recommendations.
business_analysis.point2: Writing detailed specifications, user stories and precise acceptance criteria.
business_analysis.point3: Design of robust data models, entity-relationship schemas and information architecture.
business_analysis.point4: Team support, training and change management to ensure solution adoption.

software_dev.hero_description: We design and develop custom, robust and scalable software to digitalize your processes and optimize your performance.
software_dev.what_text: Software development consists of creating desktop, mobile or cloud applications to meet specific business needs. Our agile methodology guarantees flexibility, quality and respect for deadlines.
software_dev.service1_desc: Windows, macOS and Linux software with modern interfaces and optimal performance.
software_dev.service2_desc: Native iOS/Android apps and cross-platform React Native/Flutter solutions to reach all your users.
software_dev.service3_desc: SaaS applications, microservices and serverless architectures for maximum scalability.
software_dev.service4_desc: Connection of your existing tools, REST/GraphQL APIs and real-time data synchronization.
software_dev.why_text: Custom software adapts perfectly to your specific processes, offers a competitive advantage and evolves with your company unlike generic solutions.
software_dev.description1: We design and develop custom, robust and scalable software to digitalize your processes and optimize your performance.
software_dev.description2: Software development consists of creating desktop, mobile or cloud applications to meet specific business needs. Our agile methodology guarantees flexibility, quality and respect for deadlines.
software_dev.point1: Windows, macOS and Linux software with modern interfaces and optimal performance.
software_dev.point2: Native iOS/Android apps and cross-platform React Native/Flutter solutions to reach all your users.
software_dev.point3: SaaS applications, microservices and serverless architectures for maximum scalability.
software_dev.point4: Connection of your existing tools, REST/GraphQL APIs and real-time data synchronization.

product_design.hero_subtitle: From idea to successful digital product
product_design.hero_description: We transform your ideas into viable, desirable and technically solid digital products through an iterative and user-centered approach.
product_design.what_text: Product design covers the entire life cycle of a digital product: ideation, validation, design, development and iteration. Our Design Thinking approach guarantees products that meet real market needs.
product_design.service1_desc: Innovation workshops, market studies, MVP and hypothesis validation before major investment.
product_design.service2_desc: Strategic planning, feature prioritization and clear roadmap for development.
product_design.service3_desc: Rapid prototyping, user testing and concept validation in just a few days.
product_design.service4_desc: Product management, performance metrics, backlog management and continuous optimization.
product_design.why_text: Rigorous product design drastically reduces failure risks, optimizes time-to-market and ensures you develop the right product for the right users.
product_design.description1: We transform your ideas into viable, desirable and technically solid digital products through an iterative and user-centered approach.
product_design.description2: Product design covers the entire life cycle of a digital product: ideation, validation, design, development and iteration. Our Design Thinking approach guarantees products that meet real market needs.
product_design.point1: Innovation workshops, market studies, MVP and hypothesis validation before major investment.
product_design.point2: Strategic planning, feature prioritization and clear roadmap for development.
product_design.point3: Rapid prototyping, user testing and concept validation in just a few days.
product_design.point4: Product management, performance metrics, backlog management and continuous optimization.
